A, a wholly-owned subsidiary of Caterpillar ("CAT Lux"), and ERA Mining Machinery Limited, a wholly-owned subsidiary of Caterpillar ("ERA Mining"), entered into a settlement agreement (the "Agreement") with Mr.

Oberhelman (i) confirmed the Company's 2011 sales and revenues and profit per share outlook that it previously released on July 22, 2011, and (ii) stated that the Company's order backlog, which was at a record level of $21.9 billion as of June 30, 2011, continued at a record level through early August 2011.
A copy of the press release is furnished herewith as Exhibit 99.1 and is incorporated herein by reference.
